label: Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion

node.label: Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion
node.definition: Graph compilers and inference runtimes transform model programs through tracing, lowering, scheduling, operator fusion, code generation, and device-specific execution.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion is modeled as depending on Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels and feeding downstream nodes such as Model servers & inference runtimes, Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Structured-decoding runtimes.

limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Programming languages, compilers & type systems, CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels.
